commentary_links.hebrew: כְּמ֣וֹ שַׁ֭בְּלוּל תֶּ֣מֶס יַהֲלֹ֑ךְ נֵ֥פֶל אֵ֝֗שֶׁת בַּל־חָ֥זוּ שָֽׁמֶשׁ׃
commentary_links.english:
like a snail that melts away as it moves;clike a snail that melts away as it moves Meaning of Heb. uncertain.
like a woman’s stillbirth—may they never see the sun!
commentary_links.matched_snippet: תמס יהלך נפל אשת בל חזו שמש &star תנו רבנן צדין
